steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The opening phrase says something was woven from recycled yarn and hand tufted using a carpet weaving technique. That modifier must attach to the subject that comes next. The logical subject is the topological tapestries, because the tapestries are the woven and tufted objects.

steps.title: Avoid a dangling modifier
steps.content: Choices B, C, and D all make Alexandra Kehayoglou the main subject after the opening modifier. That creates a dangling modifier because it would illogically suggest the artist herself was woven from recycled yarn and hand tufted. The sentence needs the subject immediately after the modifier to be the tapestries of Alexandra Kehayoglou, making the description grammatical and logical. The answer is A.
